title: スプリンターズSの後に・キラキラ

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Coming in first place, it's Hishi Akebono!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I might've lost again, but that was fire! You really
are somethin' else, Akebono!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'm never gonna give up, though! Not for the next
race, or the one after that, or the one after that!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A big round of applause rains down around
Akebono to celebrate her triumph.

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan A
text_block_list.text: Wow, her power is just incredible!

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan B
text_block_list.text: For sure! Bono's races are the best!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, I knew it. But of course I did. I've seen this
sight so many times already.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono dashes toward the runners' tunnel
amid the audience's thunderous cheers.
